system.flavor: Swing the great scythe, and pull forth the fruit of death.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. On hit: +1d3 damage
Area effect: 2 damage.
On hit a thrall adjacent to your foe at the end of your turn.
Finishing blow two, or three if your foe is in crisis.

Thrall
Summon (6)
Summon Action thralls dash 3 spaces, then explode, dealing 2 damage to an adjacent foe or granting 2 vigor to an adjacent ally. Increase to 1d3+1 against characters in crisis. Then dismiss the thrall.
